subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which famous fort is located in Jodhpur?
question_hi: जोधपुर में कौन सा मंगलवाला है?
explanation_en:
Mehrangarh Fort is a famous fort located in Jodhpur, Rajasthan.
मेरंगराघर, Rajasthan में मंगलवाला है।
explanation_hi:
Mehrangarh Fort is a famous fort located in Jodhpur, Rajasthan.
